meta.title: Milvus — The Vector Database That Powers AI
meta.description: Open-source Milvus gives AI applications — from RAG to agents — production-grade hybrid search, built-in embeddings, and scale to 100B+ vectors.

hero.title: The <0>Vector Database</0><1 /> That Powers AI
hero.subtitle: Open-source Milvus gives AI applications — from RAG to agents — production-grade hybrid search, built-in embeddings, and scale to 100B+ vectors.
hero.attuAlt: Attu — Milvus management UI, vector search results

pillars.sectionSubtitle: Four capabilities that make Milvus drop-in for modern AI applications.

hybrid.title: Hybrid Search, Built-in
hybrid.body: Combine semantic (dense), keyword (BM25 sparse), and rerankers in one query. No external Elasticsearch. Better RAG answers out of the box.

embeddings.title: Embeddings Without the Pipeline
embeddings.body: Call OpenAI, Cohere, BGE, Jina, or local models directly inside Milvus. No separate embedding service to run and scale.

memory.title: Memory That Scales With Your Agent
memory.body: Partition per user, per session, per tool. Session memory today, billions of long-term memories tomorrow — same API.

mcp.title: MCP-Native
mcp.body: Expose Milvus as an MCP server with one command. LangGraph, CrewAI, Claude Desktop, Cursor — all speak MCP.

walkthrough.sectionTitle: Start building your AI app in minutes
walkthrough.sectionSubtitle: Four snippets that cover the real Agent workflow.

notes.addMemory: Start a local Milvus with docker-compose and you're running in under a minute.
notes.semanticRecall: Hybrid search, filters, and rerank are one flag away when you need better recall.
notes.multiTenant: Partition Key + Resource Groups give you per-tenant isolation without running a cluster per customer.
notes.mcpServer: Any MCP-aware agent can now read and write your Milvus data as tools.

architecture.sectionTitle: Built for the Real Scale of AI — Without the Real Cost
architecture.sectionSubtitle: Milvus 2.6 rebuilt the streaming and storage layers from the ground up to run billion-scale vector workloads on cheap object storage.

disaggregation.title: Storage–Compute Disaggregation
disaggregation.body: Query, data, and streaming nodes scale independently on top of cheap object storage.

scale.title: Billion-Scale at a Fraction of the Cost
scale.body: Milvus 2.6's new Woodpecker WAL replaces Kafka/Pulsar — zero-disk, cloud-native, dramatically cheaper at scale.

tenant.title: Multi-Tenant by Design
tenant.body: Partition Key + Resource Groups — one cluster, thousands of tenants, full isolation.

deploy.title: Deploy Anywhere, Same API
deploy.body: Standalone on a single box, Distributed on Kubernetes, or Zilliz Cloud — same MilvusClient code.

ecosystem.sectionTitle: Plugs Into Your Entire AI Stack
ecosystem.sectionSubtitle: Drop Milvus into the agent framework, model API, RAG tool, or protocol you already use.

production.sectionTitle: Trusted in production by the teams building AI

nandula.content: Based on our research, Milvus was selected as the vector database of choice (over Chroma and Pinecone). Milvus is an open-source vector database designed specifically for similarity search on massive datasets of high-dimensional vectors.
nandula.author: Nandula Asel
nandula.title: Senior Data Scientist

bhargav.content: With its focus on efficient vector similarity search, Milvus empowers you to build robust and scalable image retrieval systems. Whether you're managing a personal photo library or developing a commercial image search application, Milvus offers a powerful foundation for unlocking the hidden potential within your image collections.
bhargav.author: Bhargav Mankad
bhargav.title: Senior Solution Architect

igor.content: Milvus is a powerful vector database tailored for processing and searching extensive vector data. It stands out for its high performance and scalability, rendering it perfect for machine learning, deep learning, similarity search tasks, and recommendation systems.
igor.author: Igor Gorbenko
igor.title: Big Data Architect

meetups.title: Unstructured Data Meetups
meetups.desc: Join a community of passionate developers and engineers dedicated to Gen AI.
